name: Bruce Hornsby
abstract: Bruce Randall Hornsby (born November 23, 1954) is an American singer-songwriter and pianist. His music draws from a wide range of traditions — folk, jazz, modern classical, bluegrass, rock, and jam band styles.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: I called Bruce Hornsby and I played a couple things I was writing and I said, “You want to write some lyrics to this?” and he said, “Yeah.” He wrote some lyrics and when he finished the title became “The Dirty Ground,”
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
